18.reason: [The loop condition i < len - 1 skips the last character, but the last character is handled later. However, if the string has only one character or the '-' is at the end, this may cause issues. More critically, the logic for handling '-' at position i=1 or i=len-2 may access out-of-bounds indices when checking str1[i-1] or str1[i+1] if the string is short.]
